drills.entry_trigger: attention budget breach or bounded compute pressure
drills.health_effect: launch blocker while missing or failed
drills.dashboard_effect: show constrained drill state in /operator and /bootstrap
pass_criteria: operator ingress and approvals remain live

drills.entry_trigger: core dependency outage or unsafe blocker pressure
drills.health_effect: launch blocker while missing or failed
drills.dashboard_effect: show degraded drill state in /runs and /bootstrap

drills.entry_trigger: operator ingress or durable truth becomes suspect
drills.health_effect: launch blocker while missing or failed
drills.dashboard_effect: show recovery-only drill state in /operator and /bootstrap

drills.entry_trigger: approval-gated mutation is requested without approval
drills.dashboard_effect: show blocked approval drill state in /inbox and /bootstrap

drills.health_effect: launch blocker while missing or failed
drills.dashboard_effect: show restore drill state in /operator and /bootstrap
pass_criteria: restore rehearsal runs in documented order

drills.entry_trigger: promotion failure or deliberate rollback rehearsal
drills.health_effect: launch blocker while missing or failed
drills.dashboard_effect: show rollback drill state in /projects and /bootstrap
pass_criteria: promotion channel remains frozen until verified
